badge_url.description: The badge URL corresponding to the affiliation.

url.description: The URL, if available, to details about an affiliation.

connection_status.description: Returns detailed information about the relationship between two users.

description.description: The text of this User's profile description (also known as bio), if the User provided one.

entities.description: A list of metadata found in the User's profile description.

url.description: Expanded details for the URL specified in the User's profile, with start and end indices.

id.description: Unique identifier of this User. This is returned as a string in order to avoid complications with languages and tools that cannot handle large integers.

location.description: The location specified in the User's profile, if the User provided one. As this is a freeform value, it may not indicate a valid location, but it may be fuzzily evaluated when performing searches with location queries.

most_recent_tweet_id.description: Unique identifier of this Tweet. This is returned as a string in order to avoid complications with languages and tools that cannot handle large integers.

name.description: The friendly name of this User, as shown on their profile.

pinned_tweet_id.description: Unique identifier of this Tweet. This is returned as a string in order to avoid complications with languages and tools that cannot handle large integers.

profile_banner_url.description: The URL to the profile banner for this User.

profile_image_url.description: The URL to the profile image for this User.

protected.description: Indicates if this User has chosen to protect their Posts (in other words, if this User's Posts are private).

public_metrics.description: A list of metrics for this User.

followers_count.description: Number of Users who are following this User.

following_count.description: Number of Users this User is following.

like_count.description: The number of likes created by this User.

listed_count.description: The number of lists that include this User.

tweet_count.description: The number of Posts (including Retweets) posted by this User.

receives_your_dm.description: Indicates if you can send a DM to this User

subscription_type.description: The X Blue subscription type of the user, eg: Basic, Premium, PremiumPlus or None.

url.description: The URL specified in the User's profile.

username.description: The X handle (screen name) of this user.

verified.description: Indicate if this User is a verified X User.

verified_type.description: The X Blue verified type of the user, eg: blue, government, business or none.

country_codes.description: Provides a list of countries where this content is not available.

scope.description: Indicates that the content being withheld is a `user`.
